  1. org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.dialect

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.dialect

Packages that use org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.dialect
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.convert
JDBC-specific conversion classes.
org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.dialect
JDBC-specific Dialect implementations.
org.springframework.data.jdbc.dialect
 
org.springframework.data.jdbc.repository.aot
Ahead-of-Time (AOT) generation for Spring Data JDBC repositories.
org.springframework.data.jdbc.repository.config
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.dialect used by org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.convert
    Class
    Description
    JdbcArrayColumns
    ArrayColumns that offer JDBC-specific functionality.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.dialect used by org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.dialect
    Class
    Description
    DialectResolver.JdbcDialectProvider
    SPI to extend Spring's default JDBC Dialect discovery mechanism.
    JdbcArrayColumns
    ArrayColumns that offer JDBC-specific functionality.
    JdbcArrayColumns.DefaultSupport
    Default ArrayColumns implementation for dialects that do not support array-typed columns.
    JdbcArrayColumns.Unsupported
    Default ArrayColumns implementation for dialects that do not support array-typed columns.
    JdbcDb2Dialect
    Db2Dialect that registers JDBC specific converters.
    JdbcDialect
    ArrayColumns that offer JDBC specific functionality.
    JdbcH2Dialect
    JDBC-specific H2 Dialect.
    JdbcHsqlDbDialect
    JDBC-specific HsqlDB Dialect.
    JdbcMySqlDialect
    MySqlDialect that registers JDBC specific converters.
    JdbcOracleDialect
    JDBC-specific Oracle Dialect.
    JdbcPostgresDialect
    JDBC specific Postgres Dialect.
    JdbcSqlServerDialect
    SqlServerDialect that registers JDBC specific converters.

    Class
    Description
    DialectResolver.DefaultDialectProvider
     
    DialectResolver.JdbcDialectProvider
    SPI to extend Spring's default JDBC Dialect discovery mechanism.
    DialectResolver.NoDialectException
    Exception thrown when DialectResolver cannot resolve a Dialect.
    JdbcDialect
    ArrayColumns that offer JDBC specific functionality.
